name: Creighton Abrams
longDesc: Commandant du 37e bataillon blindé qui débloque Bastogne à la Noël 1944, Creighton Abrams poursuit une carrière jusqu'au commandement au Vietnam ; le char M1 porte son nom. En WC4, carte blindée tier-S or à profil marching élevé, partenaire naturel de Patton.

skills.name: Break The Encirclement
skills.desc: After annihilating enemy troops, 60% rate to lower the morale of 2 enemies within 1 grid of you.

skills.name: Anticipation
skills.desc: When commanding troops to move, dealt damage +10% (up to 50%) for each grid moved for 1 turn.

skills.name: Panzer Leader
skills.desc: 24% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding armored units

skills.name: Armored Assault
skills.desc: Deal +12% damage to the enemy when commanding armored units

skills.name: Blitzkrieg
skills.desc: 36% chance that the enemy will not fight back when commanding armored units

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Creighton Abrams commanded the 37th Tank Battalion that broke through to Bastogne at Christmas 1944 and later led US forces in Vietnam; the M1 tank bears his name. In WC4 a tier-S gold armor card with high marching — Patton's natural partner.
longDescDe: Creighton Abrams führte das 37. Panzerbataillon, das an Weihnachten 1944 den Durchbruch nach Bastogne schaffte, und später die US-Truppen in Vietnam; der M1-Panzer trägt seinen Namen. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Panzerkarte mit hohem Marschwert — Pattons natürlicher Partner.
